title: idalia albiflora
intro: Idalia albiflora, commonly known as White Idalia, is a flowering plant species in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and other respiratory issues. The therapeutic actions of Idalia albiflora include its ability to act as a bronchodilator, reducing airway constriction and making it easier to breathe, as well as its anti-diarrheal properties. The bioactive constituents of Idalia albiflora include alkaloids, terpenoids, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
